_meta.policy: Secondary symbol-change feed for review only. No ticker, name, listing, or corporate-action data is applied without listing-keyed official exchange or issuer evidence.

symbol_change_backlog.source_gate: Symbol-change feed rows are review signals only; ticker, name, listing, or alias changes require listing-keyed official venue or issuer evidence for old/new symbols and issuer identity.
